description: Complete rewrite of voice system (voice.js) to fix the bug where voice stops working after 1 question. Process ALL commands client-side (no API calls), implement persistent listening with robust error recovery, visual feedback, TTS confirmations, read-question-aloud command, and persistent voice indicator in exam header.
steps: Rewrite static/js/voice.js with client-side command processing, persistent listening, error recovery, TTS, visual feedback
Update templates/exam_questions.html to add voice-indicator span in exam header
Add CSS for voice indicator (pulsing green dot animation) in static/css/exam.css
acceptance_criteria: All basic commands (next, previous, select A/B/C/D, submit, time, read, help) processed client-side without API calls
Speech recognition restarts on end (500ms delay) and on error (1s delay)
After 5 consecutive errors, shows microphone issue message but retries every 3 seconds
Visual feedback shows pulsing dot when listening, last heard command, and action taken
Read question aloud command reads current question text and options
Voice keeps listening after closing overlay with small microphone indicator in exam header
CSS pulsing green dot animation for voice indicator
